title: sanguisorba officinalis var. auriculata
intro: Sanguisorba officinalis var. auriculata, also known as the auricled burnet, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and astringent effects, as well as its ability to stop bleeding. The health benefits of this plant include treating wounds, reducing inflammation, and alleviating digestive issues. Sanguisorba officinalis var. auriculata can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and it is also used as an ingredient in herbal salves and creams.
